arts.ttl: "We want to advance to the next round" - Ansgar Knauff
arts.sum: The former Borussia Dortmund winger hopes he and his teammates can reach the last-eight of the UEFA Europa League tomorrow evening.

arts.ttl: Dino Toppmoller demands "focused and concentrated" performance against Ajax
arts.sum: Die Adler's gaffer shared his thoughts ahead of tomorrow's crucial second-leg fixture against Ajax Amsterdam.

arts.ttl: ‘They demand more effort in training and matches’ – Elye Wahi compares Bundesliga to Ligue 1
arts.sum: Elye Wahi (22) has given his first impressions on the differences between football in the Bundesliga compared to Ligue 1 in an interview with L’Équipe. The young striker joined the…

arts.ttl: ‘They didn’t give me a chance’ – Elye Wahi reveals his ‘disappointment’ with Marseille stay
arts.sum: Elye Wahi (22) was one of the latest players to find himself subject to the revolving door policy at Olympique de Marseille after he was sold to Eintracht Frankfurt only…

arts.ttl: Frankfurt linked with SC Paderborn marksman
arts.sum: Ilyas Ansah could be the next name on a long list of talented strikers to represent Eintracht Frankfurt.
